body:
Flagged by AI reviewer in PR \#911.

## Problem

`lib/generators.sh` line 660 contains a no-op `sed` invocation:
```
sed -i 's|^\(  agents:\)|\1|' "$compose_file"
```

This replaces `  agents:` with itself — it does nothing. It is dead code left over from a prior iteration.

## Fix

Remove the no-op `sed` line at line 660 of `lib/generators.sh`.

## Affected files
- `lib/generators.sh` (line 660 — the no-op sed invocation in generate_compose --build mode)

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] The no-op sed line is removed from `lib/generators.sh`
- [ ] `shellcheck` clean on `lib/generators.sh`
- [ ] CI green

---
*Auto-created from AI review*
